stops.extraction_target: Reason: the number of characters when written as a Roman numeral
stops.reasoning: Analytical transform (roman_numeral_letter_count) on stop 18 value
stops.reason_code:
def to_roman(n):
    n = abs(int(n))
    vals = [(1000,'M'),(900,'CM'),(500,'D'),(400,'CD'),(100,'C'),
            (90,'XC'),(50,'L'),(40,'XL'),(10,'X'),(9,'IX'),(5,'V'),(4,'IV'),(1,'I')]
    r = ''
    for v, s in vals:
        while n >= v:
            r += s; n -= v
    return r
result = len(to_roman(13))
print(result)
